title: scilla glandulosa
intro: Scilla glandulosa, also known as the autumn-flowering scilla, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Asparagaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The plant has been used to treat a range of health issues, including respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as skin conditions and digestive issues. The herbal preparation of Scilla glandulosa is typically made into a tincture or infusion, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it.
